name: Carafe Coffee - Nuxt Frontend
description: Nuxt 3 frontend for Carafe Coffee e-commerce platform

NUXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL.description: Public URL of the Nuxt frontend

NUXT_PUBLIC_STRAPI_URL.description: Public URL of the Strapi backend API

STRIPE_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Stripe publishable key (pk_live_... for production, pk_test_... for sandbox). Safe to expose to browser. Get from https://dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys
